scripts.deploy: npm run build && firebase use prod && firebase deploy --only hosting:prod
scripts.deploy:demo: npm run build && firebase use demo && firebase deploy --only hosting:demo
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && firebase use prod && firebase deploy --only hosting:prod
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:run: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.android:aab: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr" && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
scripts.android:apk: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr" && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:archive: cd ios/App && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -archivePath build/App.xcarchive -allowProvisioningUpdates archive
scripts.ios:export-ipa: cd ios/App && xcodebuild -exportArchive -archivePath build/App.xcarchive -exportPath build/ipa -exportOptionsPlist ExportOptions-AppStore.plist
scripts.ios:release: npm run ios:archive && npm run ios:export-ipa
scripts.ios:run: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
